name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after on-the-job accident in Utah?
description: One year in Utah from accident or disability onset.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after on-the-job accident in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: One year in Utah from accident or disability onset.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, you generally have one year from the accident or date of disability to file a workers' comp claim with the Labor Commission.[2] Missing this bars benefits unless good cause shown. Key factors: (1) One-year statute from injury or knowledge; (2) Employer must be notified sooner; (3) Late claims need justification like delayed symptoms; (4) Appeals have separate timelines. Report immediately and file formally within deadline. Track all dates and seek legal advice to avoid denial.
